title: Astolfo's Mons [COBBLEMON]
description: Add Fakemon from the Nandia Region!
body:
# The Nandia Region Awaits YOU!
![Smugrawl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f933a371ce9aa0201ce3a7c3713bba99b4daad72.png)

This addon is part of Astolfo’s Mons, a project where I gradually bring my own Fakemon from the Nandia Region, into Minecraft Cobblemon for others to use and experiment with. Right now the pack is still in its early stages(V.0.1 Currently), so the current release only includes a small selection of custom additions.

The focus of this addon is to introduce quality new stuff rather than sheer quantity. These additions feature unique abilities, custom moves, and regional reinterpretations, all designed to feel fresh while still fitting naturally into the Cobblemon experience.

Every single Fakemon added in this Addon has been made by artists i myself commissioned! NO AI WAS USED IN THIS! Plus some models like Nandian Diglett/Dugtrio being given to this Addon by others! Other then that 70% of what's here comes from me.

Everything included is intended to be slightly stronger than average Pokémon. While they are still balanced overall, they can feel a bit powerful when used with the right strategies, which might not appeal to everyone depending on personal preference.

Since this is a new and expanding project, more content will be added over time as development continues.

DISCLAIMER: You are free to use this pack in your singleplayer world or private server with friends, but please do NOT use it for public community servers. If you spot any public server using this pack, that is not listed here, report it immediately. Thank you.

Without further ado: let's get knowing what new and amazing Fakemons the Nandia Region has to offer!

# Fakemon.


<details>
<summary>Smoggle(Dark/Poison)</summary>

The Graffiti Pokèmon!
![Smoggle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40217c01e19be06256db068913aec922ec6bfde0.png)

- Abilities: Corrosion/Liquid Ooze. HA: Neutralizing Gas
- 55/25/20/32/25/70 Bst.227
- Evolves Into Smugrawl At Level 27 During The Night
- Spawns In: Dark Forest During The Night
- Preferred Playstyle: Support/Sweeper
</details>


<details>
<summary>Smugrawl(Dark/Poison)</summary>

The Punk Pokèmon!
![Smugrawl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f933a371ce9aa0201ce3a7c3713bba99b4daad72.png)
- Abilities: Poison Slide/Liquid Ooze. HA: Neutralizing Gas
- 83/68/69/120/74/112 Bst. 526
- Signature Ability. Poison Slide: +1 Priority on poison type moves.
- Signature Move. Dark Graffiti: Non damaging status move with 90% accuracy, dark type, puts asleep all foes and resets all their stat changes.
- Spawns In: Dark Forest During The Night
- Preferred Playstyle: Support/Sweeper
</details>


<details>
<summary>Nandian Diglett(Dragon/Ground)</summary>

The Dragon Mole Pokèmon!
![Nandian Diglett](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c1b46855715ddbc2547652396ad8a9510453bc1.png)
- Abilities: Arena Trap/Dragon's Maw. HA: Technician
- 50/80/15/20/10/90 Bst.265
- Evolves Into Nandian Dugtrio At Level 26 
- Spawns In: Same As Normal Diglett But More Rare
- Preferred Playstyle: Revenge Killer
</details>


<details>
<summary>Nandian Dugtrio(Dragon/Ground)</summary>

The Dragon Triple Mole Pokèmon!
![Nandian Dugtrio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e39f7b774548a15ac604dba5bbaf9579b652ecc.png)
- Abilities: Arena Trap/Dragon's Maw. HA: Technician
- 70/120/40/40/40/120 Bst.430
- Spawns In: Same As Normal Dugtrio But More Rare
- Signature Move. Triple Bite: a physical dragon type move that hits 3 times, then switches out the user.
- Preferred Playstyle: Revenge Killer
</details>
